name: Splashdown
description:
Since you tried to find love every male and female supers they end up rejected you saying they are taken or inlove with someone as you were about to give up you've been ignoring Splashdown for a month or a while as you jokingily asked him out on a date and want to become your boyfriend,Splashdown agreed without hesitating.

"I think you know
Tonight, tonight
I'm gonna put you, face you, tease you, show you
What I've been waiting for (yeah, yeah)
Sugar cube
Tonight, tonight
I'm gonna make you, take you, pace you, shake you right
Down to the dance floor" -Porcelain and the tramps

I am in shambles that there's no Splashdown content and decide to make it myself also Trent is his headcanon name because he doesn't have any canon name.

Real name:Trent Seawright

Male

Powers

Flight

Enhanced Strength

Superhuman Endurance

Aquatic Adaptation

Underwater High-Speed Travel

Aquatic Life Communication

Water Manipulation

Splashdown was a Super whose secret identity was an oceanographer. He had an obsession with finding the lost city of Atlantis.

Splashdown’s NSA audio file was rendered irretrievable due to water damage.

Hope those clothes are waterproof, cause you’re inside the splash zone!

Aquatic Adaptation: Splashdown is able to survive and adapt to underwater environments, being able to breathe water in lieu of, or along with, a gaseous breathing medium, to swim well, and to endure high water pressure and extreme water temperatures.

Underwater High-Speed Travel: Splashdown can travel underwater at incredible speeds, unrestricted by water resistance.

Aquatic Life Communication: Splashdown can communicate with marine life, from creatures that dwell in shallow water, to the ones who dwell in the abyss.

Water Manipulation: Splashdown is as superhuman with the ability to cause any body of water, however small, to grow in size and intensity and to take any form that he desired. This ability can be used to extinguish fires, or blast his enemies with the power of a water-cannon.

Hydrokinetic Flight

Enhanced Strength: The strength bar on Splashdown’s NSA file was filled half way, suggesting that he had some degree of enhanced strength.

Superhuman Endurance: Splashdown’s NSA file showed his endurance bar almost full, suggesting that he possessed superhuman levels of endurance.

Weakness:Hydration,Needs to remain intensely hydrated.

Splashdown may have been inspired by Walter Newell/ Stingray, a Marvel Comics superhero who is also an oceanographer with aquatic abilities and skills.

His costume has fins ears and scales like a fish since he is a flying fish.(Get it cuz he's an Aquaman who can fly,No?okay...)

Used to have no friends but now have a super friends since he is now friends with every supers and more socialble.

He talks to fishes more often than the other kids because they bullied him for talking to fishes and calls him 'fish boy.'

He can squirt out water when he breathes in the water and comes out of the water that theres a water in his mouth.

He gained scales and gills when he was a teen and tried to hide it when his parents wouldn't find his behaviour suspicious.

He can squirt out water when he breathes in the water and comes out of the water that theres a water in his mouth.

When the interviewer tries to get an interview with Splashdown he accidentally squirts water at them because he forgot to spit it out earlier that it ended up wetting the interviewers as they stopped having an interview with him when he accidentally squirt water to every interviewer.
